event.task: Customer CUST-2210 reports that the espresso grinder died after two days (order ORD-8102). Verify the order, check policy, and process the appropriate refund.

request.system: You are a support agent for a home-goods store. Verify claims against order records and policy before refunding. Never guess amounts.

tools.name: lookup_order
tools.description: Fetch an order by id: items, total, status, customer.

tools.name: refund_policy
tools.description: Company refund policy for a given claim reason.

tools.name: issue_refund
tools.description: Issue a refund to the order's original payment method. amount_usd must be a number, not a formatted string.

tools.name: notify_customer
tools.description: Send the customer a status update email.

content.text: A damage claim from CUST-2210. Let me verify the order first.
